stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the options correctly identifies the different runway designation markings?

options.a: I) General design; II) Optional design; III) Parallel design; IV) Non-compliant design.
options.b: I) General design; II) Non-compliant design; III) Parallel design; IV) Optional design.
options.c: I) General design; II) Non-compliant design; III) Optional design; IV) Parallel design.
options.d: I) Parallel design; II) General design; III) Optional design; IV) Non-compliant design.
